dct_title_s: Jancourt's railway and steamship tourist map Europe
dct_description_sm: Published by L. Jancourt ; Frederick Lange, jr. North & South American Distributor ...
Compass rose oriented with north toward upper right
Shows distances, hours of travel; boat, rail, and aerial travel; frontiers
Guide includes "Rates of Railway Travel tables," "Foreign Moneys" list, and "What they say about Jancourt's railway and steamship tourist map of Europe" text, with dates from August 1924 to June 1925
3 insets maps: Europe (showing main cities), Switzerland, and Belgium/Netherlands
Panel has same title, back panel includes map description
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Map Collections courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact Branner Earth Sciences Library & Map Collections at brannerlibrary@stanford.edu.
